description_long: This bungalow features a light beige exterior with horizontal siding and a prominent, dark gray gabled roof. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, large windows, and a main entrance door, creating a welcoming appearance. On one side, a mature tree with vibrant orange foliage adds natural character and shade to the property. The rear of the bungalow is more solid, with minimal window openings and a simple, uninterrupted wall. The structure sits on a rectangular grassy plot, bordered by a narrow concrete or stone foundation. The overall design is compact, with a single main story and a partial upper level, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A beige bungalow with a dark gabled roof, large front windows, and a covered porch, set on a grassy plot with a vibrant orange tree. The design is compact and suburban, with a mix of open and solid facades.
description_view_0: The front view shows the covered porch, large windows, and main entrance, with the orange tree to the right.
description_view_1: The right side view highlights the side windows, the extension of the roof, and the proximity of the orange tree.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid wall with minimal openings and the base of the structure.
description_view_3: The left side view reveals additional windows and the grassy yard, with the orange tree in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
